title: Are Religious Conversions ACTUALLY Just UFO Encounters?
summary: Jesse Michels discusses the theory that religious conversion experiences may actually be UFO encounters, citing research by Professor Diana Pula on Catholic Purgatory and the case of St. Francis of Assisi's stigmata as a potential UFO encounter.

events.description: Religious studies Professor Diana Pula researched Catholic Purgatory for her book

key_claims.claim: St. Francis of Assisi witnessed atmospheric sparks, a spinning disc-like object, and telepathically communicated with it at Mount La Verna
St. Francis received hand wounds from rays of light shooting out of the disc, which were later interpreted as the Stigmata of Christ
Diana Pula found that Christ wasn't in the original texts describing Francis's encounter and was added later by the church
The hand wounds caused by light sound exactly like radiation burns caused by typical UFO encounters
